description_long: A young adult woman stands confidently, resting her right hand on a tall metal tool resembling a pipe wrench or clamp. She wears a long-sleeve shirt with rolled-up sleeves, rugged work pants with knee patches, and sturdy boots, suggesting she is prepared for manual labor or technical work. Her outfit is accessorized with a utility belt, pouches, and a large apron, indicating she may be a mechanic or engineer. She has two long braids and wears goggles on her head, further emphasizing a practical, hands-on profession. The figure's stance is relaxed yet alert, with her left hand on her hip and her weight shifted to one leg. The overall appearance is that of a capable, resourceful individual ready for urban or industrial tasks.
description: A young woman in work attire stands with one hand on a tall tool, wearing utility gear, boots, and goggles, exuding a practical, technical vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows her relaxed stance, facial expression, goggles, and the tool she leans on.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of her face, the thickness of her braids, and the side of the tool.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of her head, braids, utility belt, and pouches, as well as the back of her boots and pants.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view emphasizes the apron, pouches, and the way she leans on the tool.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve work shirt, utility belt, apron, rugged work pants with knee patches, and gloves
attribute_posture: standing with weight shifted and one hand resting on a tool
